MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-24-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JUSTIN MOORE, AXCIENT, INC.'S NOTICE OF PETITION AND PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY COURT PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. THIS CASE SHALL BE ADJUDICATED IN BINDING ARBITRATION. THIS CIVIL CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION. MINIMAL STANDARS OF PROCEDURAL FAIRNESS APPLY IN THIS CASE. (DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

Ntc Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Court Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacey Pratt, Esq. of The Davis Law Firm, 415-278-1418 for defendants and moving parties Justin Moore and Axcient, Inc.
Steven Kesten, Esq., 415-457-2668 for plaintiff and opposing party Jack McGovern

Ruling:
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification as follows:
DEFENDANTS JUSTIN MOORE, AXCIENT, INC.'S Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Court Proceedings IS GRANTED. THIS CASE SHALL BE ADJUDICATED IN BINDING ARBITRATION. THIS CIVIL CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION. MINIMAL STANDARS OF PROCEDURAL FAIRNESS APPLY IN THIS CASE. (Defendant's counsel to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)
